issues.description: Missing static effect for passive ability: 'If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains [Blocker] and +4 cost.' This should be a separate effect with trigger 'Trigger' (or similar passive), condition checking Leader type, and actions applying [Blocker] keyword and cost boost.
Condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' is incorrect. Should be 'LeaderHasType' to check if Leader has {Revolutionary Army} type.
Target scope uses 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' which may need clarification on the 'up to 1' limit enforcement; verify if this properly enforces the optional targeting.
